title: Dark server console
description: Makes the Minecraft server console use dark mode.
body:
![](https://img.shields.io/badge/Mod%20Loader-fabric%2Fforge-lightgray?style=for-the-badge)
# Dark Server Console
*Makes the Minecraft server console use dark mode.*


CurseForge Page: [here](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dark-server-console)  
This mod makes use of FlatLaf for theming of the Minecraft server console.

## Features
* Makes the server console use dark mode.
* A bunch of dark-mode themes.
